default_say: I'm here — keep going with your practices.

transmutation_engine.say: Welcome back! You're in the Development phase. Send me your user JSON (see the scenarios README) and I'll pull up your roadmap.

development_agent.say: Here's your active roadmap — your practices are listed in the Development tab on the right. To log a journal entry, send: {"user_id": "<your id>", "reflection": "what you noticed", "self_rating": 7}
Logged it — that's real, consistent capacity-building. Watch the entry counter tick up in the Development tab. Each entry brings you closer to reassessment.
